{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230419539867F1FB3BBA568C2F6E"}"},"total":1650},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7578182794839622462","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"太难得了，一旦招惹到主角或者对主角有恶意被主角发现之后，只要有实力，白天惹到的，晚上就给杀了，和其他小说憋憋屈屈，憋个几十章完全不一样，太爽了[笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764434863,"group_id":"7571904564484377624","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0q2Z+licBOfYSh77ZThV3AY/vMwojkltlokEqZUE+/R","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/6a5dbd0a659743f1b9d1a9dc8007e481~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792783&x-signature=OEpvzVm2X4YUjOGsjP%2BvQkmG8BU%3D","user_id":"4212928493138637","user_name":"赤锋对夹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4212928493138637","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1748839711,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":17,"name":"击穿次元","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47c082300352c1a9e6e7669d207df6fb","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/57235e9992067573933a8f743e5f9044"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7571904564484377624","book_info":{"abstract":"【天道酬勤】【爽文】【苟道流】【乱世女子贱如纸】【极道】【慢热】（评分刚出，后面会涨）
大靖末年，魑魅魍魉现世，天下大乱，民不聊生。
昏君奸臣致使王朝崩坏，各地群雄割据，有帮派荼毒一方，驱使百姓如猪狗。有邪教乱民，搜刮万民钱粮子女，伺机反叛。有豪强世族揭竿而起，化作叛军，四处烧杀抢掠。
大旱，洪水，蝗虫，地震等天灾降世，更使得百姓绝望，哀嚎。
当此之时，王胜穿越到这个乱世，到了一个被美貌妇人榨干精髓的少年身上，醉酒的爹，无主的娘，奴仆子的低贱出身。

正当王胜想着躺平，不如继续享受妇人压榨时

，金手指天道酬勤到了。

天道酬勤：学必有成。学习任何技艺，只要努力就能成功。

于是王胜以各种武道绝学不讲理的加持己身，体型堪比雄山，肌肉疙瘩比头发还要密集，骨头锋利如刀，筋皮坚韧作钢。

“我明白了，仙人，就是像我一样山一样大的人。千军万马可否挡得住我一拳？”

“我救了人，你们理应称我为仙人，为何叫我怪物呢？哦！我明白了。是怪物夺舍了你们，穿上了你们的皮囊，贼喊捉贼。别动，我这就为你们报仇。”
“我从不杀老人和小女孩。但可惜，她不是老人，他也不是小女孩。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c587c8fce2ec8cd4a30378620e7c1d2f","author":"又有余","author_id":"","book_id":"7571904564484377624","book_name":"开局被美妇坐毙？可我有挂啊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0e0f0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"13.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":830,"name":"升级流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=830&name=升级流&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7571905481938059800","read_count":"132598","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"594551"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"260","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,穿越,架空,东方玄幻,升级流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/df2c053f81ebd871e0c895def7342815~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779394793&x-signature=0KUXKTWh2tj02lB59G%2Bg%2FxdJ1LE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3878678921751931","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"34"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603230419539867F1FB3BBA568C2F6E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读60分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":260,"for
